Go Dependencies Visualizer

This is the placeholder bundle shipped with the development server. The real React + Cytoscape SPA is produced by the web/ Vite project and copied into server/internal/web/dist at Docker build time (T25).

During local development, run the Vite dev server alongside this binary — it proxies /api/* to http://localhost:8080.

The HTTP API is healthy: try /api/healthz.
